Got it, Emma — I can do that.

I found your dentist appointment:
- Title: Dentist Appointment
- When: 2024-05-18, 09:00–10:00
- Location: Downtown Dental Clinic
- Event id: 5

Before I reschedule, how would you like it moved? Options you can give me (pick one or combine):
- Tell me an exact new date/time (format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM — e.g., 2024-05-22 14:00).
- Give a date range and preference (e.g., "any morning next week" or "anytime on 2024-05-20 through 2024-05-24").
- Ask me to find the earliest 1-hour free slot in your calendar after a specific date (tell me the earliest date).

Also please confirm:
- Keep duration at 1 hour? (yes/no)
- Should I notify any participants? (rescheduling will email current participants; only your address is on the event now)

Tell me which option you want and the details, and I’ll reschedule it.
